center.name: 路易西亞德群島
center.summary: 路易西亞德群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Torresian imperial pigeon、Purple-bellied lory、White-chinned myzomela等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Louisiade Archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in south-east New Guinea, the Bismarck Archipelago, the d'Entrecasteaux Islands, the Louisiade Archipelago, the Trobriand Islands and Woodlark Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in forest, woodland, savanna, mangrove and scrub in Australia (north-east Western Australia, north Northern Territory and north Queensland, including the Torres Strait Islands), New Guinea, Aru Islands, islands in the Geelvink Bay, D'Entrecasteaux Islands and Louisiade Archipelago.Baptista, L
